leadText: Soundproof (Japanese: ぼうおん Soundproof) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations III and IV 1.1.2 Generation V 1.1.3 Generation VI to VII 1.1.4 Generation VIII 1.1.5 Sound-based moves 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Soundproof makes the Pokémon immune to sound-based moves . Generations III and IV [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon with Soundproof are immune to all sound-based moves, including their own. Pokémon with Soundproof, including inactive Pokémon, are not affected by Heal Bell . A sleeping Pokémon with this Ability cannot be woken with a Poké Flute . In Generation III and IV only, Pokémon with this Ability can still fall asleep during an uproar . Generation V [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon with Soundproof can now be affected by Heal Bell. Generation VI to VII [ edit | edit source ] Active Pokémon with Soundproof cannot be affected by Heal Bell. (Inactive Pokémon can be affected by Heal Bell even if they have Soundproof.) Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon with Soundproof are no longer immune to their own sound-based moves. Sound-based moves [ edit | edit source ] The Ability affects the following moves: Move Type Cat. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Blocks the effects of all moves that use sound. MD T D S Protects the Pokémon from the effects of any sound-based move. B S L おとを つかった わざの こうかを うけない MD GtI Unavailable S MD The Pokémon takes no damage from the effects of moves using sound! MD RT DX The Pokémon is not affected by the effects of moves that use sound, such as Growl or Uproar. But this also blocks those moves when a teammate uses them.
